what: Open the native OS folder picker via Tauri dialog plugin
why: Lets the user select a project directory without typing a path; guarantees the path exists on disk

error_handling.action: pickFolder() returns null; path field unchanged

decisions.reason: Wrapped in lib/folder-picker.ts to allow mocking in unit tests
decisions.rationale: Tauri API is unavailable in happy-dom test environment; the thin wrapper is the only seam that needs to be mocked

decisions.reason: Browse button shows '…' while picker is open (picking signal)
decisions.rationale: Prevents double-click opening two pickers and gives visible loading state
